description_long: This object is a cylindrical can, resembling a standard beverage can, with a metallic top featuring a pull-tab opening. The body is wrapped in a brightly colored label dominated by orange and yellow hues, with visible images of orange slices and bold, playful text. The label reads '100% NATURAL FLAVOR' and 'ORANGE SODA', suggesting it is a soft drink container. The can appears to be made primarily of aluminum, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The top is slightly recessed, and the pull-tab is integrated into the lid for easy opening. The overall appearance is clean and typical of single-serve soda cans found in urban environments.
description: A brightly labeled aluminum beverage can with a pull-tab lid, featuring orange and yellow graphics and bold text advertising orange soda.
description_view_0: The can's metallic pull-tab lid is clearly visible, with the label showing partial text and orange graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the '100% NATURAL FLAVOR' text and a large orange slice graphic on the label.
description_view_2: The side of the can displays the word 'ORANGE' in large, stylized letters with a vibrant orange background.
description_view_3: The can's label curves around, showing the end of the word 'ORANGE' and more of the yellow background.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: orange soda branding, '100% NATURAL FLAVOR', images of orange slices
